prerequisites: A Captain Data account at https://app.captaindata.com.
An API key (the connector's required secret field api_key), generated from the Captain Data dashboard.
Your project UID (the connector's required project_uid field), obtained from the Captain Data dashboard settings.

authMethods.name: API key
authMethods.summary: Captain Data authenticates every request with a single API key. The connector stores it in the api_key secret field. Captain Data sends it as the request header X-API-Key: <your_api_key> (case insensitive).

setupSteps.title: Get your Captain Data API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Captain Data and open Developer Settings at https://app.captaindata.com/developers. Copy your API key, which Captain Data passes as the X-API-Key header on API requests. Use this value for the connector's api_key field.

setupSteps.title: Get your project UID
setupSteps.body: Retrieve your project UID from the Captain Data dashboard settings. Per the Airbyte connector documentation, both the API key and the project UID are generated from the dashboard settings and are mandatory for this source to work. Use this value for the connector's project_uid field.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the api_key (required, secret) and project_uid (required) in the connector configuration. Both fields are mandatory; the connector cannot run without them.

sources.title: Captain Data API v1 - Introduction & Authentication
